name: Build arrival pacing board
description: Create a live board for reservation waves, walk-in pressure, seat release timing, and decision points so the front door can shape demand in real time.
source_ref: core-v2: stabilize visibility and constrain promises at the intake surface
entry_conditions: Hosts are making pacing decisions without a shared live view of incoming pressure and seating release.
Wait quote logic exists or is being installed alongside the board.
contraindications: Do not build a board no one updates during service.
Do not make the board so detailed that hosts abandon it in real time.
proof_of_completion: The host team has a single live board for reservation waves, walk-ins, and release decisions.
The board is updated through at least one real pressure window.
Hosts use the board to justify quote and pacing changes instead of relying on guesswork.
